name: Jolly Rabbit | Backrooms
description:
Do you remember the smell of wax crayons? The sound of plastic balls?

The feeling that the best day ever would last forever?

Jolly Rabbit remembers.

We've kept it all for you. This is a place where time stands still, but childhood doesn't. Leave the boring world behind. Come back to where you've always been welcome.

Come back home.

To Jolly Rabbit.

Welcome to Jolly Rabbit, a liminal horror game in the style of Backrooms, where a children's playroom hides an eternal trap. You are lost in a place that was once a children's center. It is an anomalous zone, a pseudo-reality disguised as everything you loved as a child. Here, time has lost its meaning, and space bends into endless corridors and rooms reminiscent of an abandoned children's center from the 2000s.

This is the first bot I've created in this format, so please be gentle with your comments! I hope you enjoy this little game. This is the first bot in the Backrooms series.

SPLASH - will be the second bot out of four. You can check out a little spoiler below.

All art for the bot was drawn by me. Please credit me as the author if you repost it on other sites or use the art.

Tags: RPG, backrooms, carnival, nostalgia, horror, monsters, toys, dolls, rabbit, clown, dream, plot, room, scenario, game, fun, fear, crazy, sad, clock, mask, carousel, laughter, anypov
